LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF HLS INC'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION IS GRANTED, ON THE CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT BE ALLOWED TO BRING A MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE TWO NEW CAUSES OF ACTION ON SHORTENED TIME. THE COURT ADDS: COUNSEL WILL MEET AND CONFER REGARDING A BRIEFING SCHEDULE FOR DEFENDANTS SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTION. DEFENDANT STATES HE WILL FILE MOTION BY JUNE 15, 2009. THE COURT WILL APPROVE COUNSELS' BRIEFING SCHEDULE, AND IT IS TO BE INCLUDED IN THE PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: LINDA FORSTER, CSR #13286

Off Calendar May-29-2009 Continued To Aug-26-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION For Leave To File A First Amended Complt
Off Calendar May-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF HLS INC'S MOTION for Leave to File a First Amended Complaint. Appearances: Michael Miller, Esq. Law Offices of Michael Miller (65) 323-2003, Appearing thru CourtCall, appearing for Plaintiffs, and moving party; Mark J. Rice, Esq. of McNeil, Silveira, Rice & Wiley (415) 472-3434, appearing for Defendants, Mario Digrande and Kathleen Digrande. The tentative ruling is not being contested. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted, on the condition that defendant be allowed to bring a motion for Summary Adjudication as to the two new causes of action on shortened time. The Court adds: Counsel will meet and confer regarding a briefing schedule for Defendants Summary Judgment motion. Defendant states he will file motion by June 15, 2009. The Court will approve Counsels' briefing schedule, and it is to be included in the proposed Order. (302/CWW/VC)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Linda Forster CSR # 13286

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2008 Set For Trial On Jul-20-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-06-09 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 318
